entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SIMULATION
entities.description: The process of simulating agricultural systems to predict outcomes and analyze performance.

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: Agricultural Production Systems sIMulator, a software framework used for agricultural simulation.

entities.name: METEOROLOGICAL DATA
entities.description: Weather-related input data required to run agricultural simulations.

entities.name: DATA ACQUISITION
entities.description: The process of collecting necessary input data for simulations.

entities.name: DATA TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of converting raw data into a specific format required by simulation software.

entities.name: DATA PREPARATION
entities.description: The overall process of preparing input and settings files before simulation processing.

entities.name: INITIAL TESTING
entities.description: The process of verifying simulation setups before full-scale execution.

entities.name: COMPUTING TIME ESTIMATIONS
entities.description: The process of predicting the time required to run a set of simulations.

entities.name: SCHEDULING
entities.description: The organization of simulation tasks to optimize computing resources.

entities.name: PARALLEL PROCESSING
entities.description: The simultaneous execution of multiple simulations to reduce total computing time.

entities.name: SIMULATION OPTIMIZATION
entities.description: General methods used to improve the efficiency and speed of agricultural simulations.
